sent_simp: 民国初年颁布了《临时约法》。
sent_trad: 民國初年頒布了《臨時約法》。
english: In the early years of the Republic of China, the Provisional Constitution was promulgated.

sent_simp: 他在日记里写道，那天是他最开心的一天。
sent_trad: 他在日記裡寫道，那天是他最開心的一天。
pinyin: Tā zài rìjì lǐ xiě dào, nà tiān shì tā zuì kāixīn de yī tiān.
english: He wrote in his diary that that day was the happiest day he had ever had.

sent_simp: 政府出台政策调控房价过快上涨。
sent_trad: 政府出台政策調控房價過快上漲。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūtái zhèngcè tiáokòng fángjià guò kuài shàngzhǎng.
english: The government introduced policies to regulate the rapid rise in housing prices.
